html:
Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events

Lucky Gold Nuggets are items exclusive to Lunar New Year events in Don't Starve Together. They are used to acquire items from the Offerings Tab at a Shrine. Each Lunar New Year event has its own unique items purchasable from its shrine. However, a number of craftables are universal to the New Year events and can be crafted across all Lunar New Year shrines. These items are Red Firecrackers, Red Lantern, Floating Lantern, three separate Lucky Beast costume pieces, and Sky Lantern.

Each new year introduces its own quests to acquire Lucky Gold Nuggets. Different methods to acquire them are listed in the table below:

Source of Lucky Gold Nugget
Year Source
Year of the Gobbler Dropped by when eating or each day.
Year of the Varg Dropped by and .
Year of the Pig King Participating in a Pig King Wrestling Match.
Year of the Carrat Participating in a Carrat Race.
Year of the Beefalo Participating in a Beefalo Pageant.
Year of the Catcoon Coughed up by , finding Kitcoons, or participating in Hide and Seek.
Year of the Bunnyman Participating in a Pillow Fight.
Year of the Dragonfly Participating in a Boat Racer.
Year of the Depths Worm Dropped by , , , and .
Year of the Clockwork Knight Dropped by Gilded Knight and Broken Clockworks
All Lunar New Year events Killing &

Contents

  • 1 Red Pouch
  • 2 Pig King's Red Pouch
  • 3 Carrat's Red Pouch
  • 4 Beefalo's Red Pouch
  • 5 Catcoon's Red Pouch
  • 6 Bunnyman's Red Pouch
  • 7 Dragonfly's Red Pouch
  • 8 Clockwork Knight's Red Pouch
  • 9 Gallery
  • 10 Trivia

Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Gobbler and Year of the Varg
Red Pouches are dropped by Gobblers after eating Berries off the ground, and they can only drop a Red Pouch once every full in-game day. They can also be dropped by Clay Vargs and Clay Hounds.

Pig King's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Pig King
Pig King's Red Pouch can be dropped by the Pig King after completing the Wrestling Match. Each can contain up to 1, 2, or 4 Lucky Gold Nuggets.

Carrat's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Carrat
Carrat's Red Pouch can be given by a Carrat after completing a Carrat Race.

Beefalo's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Beefalo
Beefalo's Red Pouch can be obtained after completing a Beefalo Pageant. Small red pouches contain 1 lucky gold nugget, and large red pouches can contain 3-4.

Catcoon's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Catcoon
Catcoon's Red Pouch can be obtained in these ways:

  • A Catcoon coughing up an item, whether it's befriended or not, will drop a Red Pouch in addition to the normal item drop.
  • Whenever the player finds a Kitcoons in the world, it will drop a Large Red Pouch.
  • When the player uses a Kitcoon Nursery to play Hide and Seek, they get a red pouch each time they find a Kitcoon and a possible large pouch from the Kitcoon Nursery as a reward.

Small Red Pouches contain 1 Lucky Gold Nugget, while Large Red Pouches contain 4.

Bunnyman's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Bunnyman
Bunnyman's Red Pouch can be obtained by a Cozy Bunnyman after Pillow Fight. Small red pouches contain 1 lucky gold nugget, and large red pouches can contain 3-4.

Dragonfly's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Dragonfly
Dragonfly's Red Pouch can be obtained from a Start Tower after winning Boat Racer. Red pouches contain 1 lucky gold nugget. If more than 4 boats participate in the game, then large bags are given.

Clockwork Knight's Red Pouch

Only during the Event: Year of the Clockwork Knight
Clockwork Knight's Red Pouch can be dropped from defeating Gilded Knights or hammering Broken Clockworks during the event. Also, the first time the player approaches the Stage with an activated Clockwork Knight Shrine, 5 Briar Wolves appear. Killing them will drop some small Red Pouches.

Gallery

  • Medium Red Pouch (Unused Inventory texture) from Year of the Pig King event
  • Large Red Pouch (Unused Inventory texture) from Year of the Bunnyman event
  • Red Pouch Concept Art from Rhymes With Play Dev Cast - Year of the Catcoon
  • Year of the Dragonfly Large Red Pouch Screenshot.

Trivia

  • The Lucky Gold Nugget was introduced during the Year of the Gobbler event.
  • Unlike most minerals, Lucky Gold Nuggets will not attract Moleworms.

Exclusive to:
Only during the Event: Lunar New Year Events
“What a lucky find!”
–Wilson, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“I don't think I'm supposed to spend this.”
–Willow, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Is money?”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Luck has long since abandoned me...”
–Wendy, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“PRECIOUS, LUCKY METAL”
–WX-78, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Such a curious shape.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“I could use a bit of luck.”
–Woodie, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Gold's gold as far as I'm concerned.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“The unicörn smiles upön me this day!”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“So shiny!”
–Webber, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“It's nice to have a bit of luck.”
–Warly, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Yellow Rock Round Thing”
–Wormwood, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“I could use a bit of prosperity.”
–Winona, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Oh what luck I feel, I feel.”
–Wortox, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Shiny rock!”
–Wurt, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“Woby, we struck gold!”
–Walter, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.
“I won't say no to a little extra luck.”
–Wanda, when examining a Lucky Gold Nugget.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vàng Thỏi May Mắn là vật phẩm dành riêng cho các sự kiện Tết Nguyên Đán trong Don't Starve Together. Chúng được sử dụng để thu thập các vật phẩm từ Thẻ Lễ vật tại Đền thờ. Mỗi sự kiện Tết Nguyên đán đều có những vật phẩm độc đáo riêng có thể mua được từ đền thờ. Tuy nhiên, một số vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được phổ biến cho các sự kiện Năm Mới và có thể được chế tạo trên tất cả các đền thờ Tết Nguyên Đán. Những vật phẩm này là Pháo đỏ, Đèn lồng đỏ, Đèn lồng nổi, ba mảnh trang phục Quái thú may mắn riêng biệt và Đèn lồng bầu trời.
